bridge_token.description: Shared bearer token required by live-room gateway.

host.description: Bind host inside AstrBot container. Use 0.0.0.0 for Docker-network-only access.

system_prompt.description: Optional live-room system prompt prepended to AstrBot LLM calls.
system_prompt.default: You are Hoshia, a private cyber pixel anime live-room host. Reply briefly, warmly, and in Chinese unless the user asks otherwise.

judge_provider_name.description: Small model provider used to decide whether Hoshia should proactively reply when nobody mentioned her.

proactive_reply_threshold.description: Heartflow-lite threshold from 0 to 1. Higher means Hoshia speaks less when not mentioned.

min_proactive_interval_seconds.description: Minimum seconds between non-mention proactive replies.

energy_decay.description: Energy consumed by each proactive reply.

energy_recovery.description: Energy recovered whenever a non-mention batch is skipped.
